reference: Hello, welcome to the clinic. The chances of cerebral pathology need to be ruled out, considering the history of your aneurysm. In my opinion, it would be better to get a computed tomography scan of the brain. You have not mentioned your age and gender, which is important. I hope this information helps. Have a nice day.
text: Hello. Welcome to the clinic. The chances of cerebral pathology need to be ruled out, considering the history of your aneurysm. In my opinion, it would be better to get a computed tomography scan of the brain. I have not mentioned your age and gender, which is important. I hope this information helps. Have a nice day.
